calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Nicklas Theodor Quinn-Bohmann and Kathryn Taylor Quinn-Bohmann appeared in person (petitioners).

The Court finds sufficient information from both parties. Petition to establish fact, date and place of marriage is granted.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
